embeds.description:
從 English (EN) 翻譯至 Cebuano (CEB)
> Alang niadtong wala pa'y ideya bahin sa pag-setup sa team kauban si Saya. 
> Gisulayan nako siya sa potensyal nga pagbag-o sa dula ug ania ang resulta sa akong pagsulay.
> Naghatag ako og replay code sa pipila ka mga nahigmata nga ang ilang gameplay o kadaot nga ou

從 English (EN) 翻譯至 Filipino (Tagalog) (TL)
> Para sa mga wala pa ring ideya tungkol sa pag-setup ng koponan kasama si Saya. 
> Sinubukan ko siya sa potensyal na pagbabago ng gameplay at narito ang resulta mula sa aking pagsubok.
> Nagbigay ako ng replay code ng ilang awakener na ang kanilang gamepla

content:
A bit update about Doresain and Saya.

I did AA Doresain yesterday. And after testing with Saya, Doresain gameplay change a lot.

Hello there <@1471414323883540501> <@296679098703544321> (sorry for the ping) 
So i have helot e3, thais e2 and aigis e2
Will be pulling for mouch on her daily banner and have those proto things to e2 her

Now my main question is i have saya e3 with her wheel e3 and i feel that aigis stun is good but feel like saya would be a overall better unit in this team especially with that corrosion

I haven't reached arc2 so maybe it's me being ignorant

Would appreciate your opinions on this
You can definitely run saya if you currently dont have any survivability concern, saya does improve the overall damage of the team drastically,  but also makes team even more reliant on death rez
This will be a concern when your facing bosses that have gimmick that doesnt allow you to burst them down in one turn
Rmb to changes life drain to thais if your kicking aigis

True 
so maybe this saya team would be better for boss only battle modes? 
To burst down the first health bar then corrosion will deal dmg to second health bar even tho boss is invincible

You mean the multiple health bar bosses right? 
Or something else?

Haven't cleared ch7 yet
But I remember that you wrote to use 
Burial ground on thais and helot
Life drain on aigis 
Crimson pulse on mouch

So in case of saya it would be
Burial ground on helot and saya
Life drain on thais
Crimson pulse on mouch

Right?
There are also bosses that takes reduced damaged after certain threshold,  or gain a big shield after taking some amount of damage
How do you do the replays
Is there a place to out the code in?
